title: Scattergood Pulls the Strings
writer: Christy Cabanne, Clarence Budington Kelland, Bernard Schubert
actors: Guy Kibbee, Bobs Watson, Susan Peters
plot: Small-town store owner Scattergood Baines helps a runaway boy find his father, who has escaped after being unjustly imprisoned, and a young chemist who is trying to invent a color television but is being opposed by his girlfriend'...
